channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Crypto survived WIII, jannies pin this. — 16 replies — 64.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Crypto survived WIII, jannies pin this.

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-03-02 15:06 UTC

OP

Crypto survived WIII, jannies pin this.

Early replies (first 3)

61919757
>>61919712
>WWIII
Not yet Chud...
Not yet...

61919775
>>61919712
You think THIS is WW3, dumbass?

WW2 was a world war because it involved several countries and had a big time evil guy killing people. People will remember Hitler, no one will remember YET ANOTHER Ayatolla screaming about how he wants to kill the USA.

61919783
world wars imply there are multiple equal blocks vying for power
Nowadays there is only one power, the USA, bullying everyone else into submission

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61919806
>>61919783
This. No one is trying to fight the USA, they'd lose. Easier to fight our markets and drain.

61920192
pin it jankies

61920913
>>61919712
3 cheers for Pepe!
HIP HIP

61920931
>Israel crippled Syria
>Ukraine crippled Russia
>US crippled Venezuela
>US+Israel crippled Iran
At this point we won't see WW3 during our lifetimes. Only China left with teeth, but even if they do something it will be localized.

61923891
>>61920931
you are brainwashed by US imperialists

61923921
Hold your horses, it's only just expanded to Lebanon, for a ways to go yet.

61923975
>>61923891
you are brown

61923985
>>61919775
>had a big time evil guy killing people
Do you mean Churchill after the firebombing of Dresden, or Truman after literally vaporizing 100K+ japs instantaneously? Hitler attempted to save Humanity from the global jewry you evil kike

61923996
>>61923975
As are most of your countrymen retard, and you are all ruled by an orange nigger that will continue to flood the U.S. with the turd world LOL

61924248
>>61923996
>t.

61924269
ITT: lots of brownoid seethe about the USA.

We really shouldn't let you shitskins on our internet.

61924283
> thread still not pinned
why are they so useless?

61924297
>>61924269
>ITT: lots of brownoid seethe about the USA.
>We really shouldn't let you shitskins on our internet.

61924210

>do not sell
Wait what?

61924222

61924224
>>61924190

>oil prices will be lower than ever before
What the fuck is he talking about, he's reaching levels of retardation previously considered impossible.

61924227
>>61924210
BUY HIGH
SELL LOW

61924235
>>61924190
>imagine having your kid sent back to you in a box while the orange pedo focuses on more important matters like the stock market

61924237
>>61924224
There won't be much demand if industry collapses :)

61924239
>>61924202
I mean, he is not orange, but it is the essence
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0q6yphdZhUA

61924243
>>61924237
Well, there won't be a stock market either

61924249
>>61924190
>complete victory within 2 weeks x 2
it's over

61924258
>>61924249
>one month special military operation

61924259
>>61924235
What would he know, he's a draft dodger.

61924270
>this is just a 3 day Great Military Operation to lower oil prices
Can someone smother this fucking demented old retard with a pillow already

61924290
>>61924190
I voted for this

item.title: Today is the day — 11 replies — 44.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Today is the day

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-03-02 15:01 UTC

OP

Lunar eclipse is today anons. Last solar eclipse Feb 17th was the local bottom. Full moon/lunar eclipse historically marks the crash day according to Puetz cycle.

BTC is going to crash. A lot of blood. Mercury retrograde just started, we're in the crash window until March 9th. Elliott Wave confirms 3rd of 3rd wave down on SPX which drags everything with it.

And now US/Israel vs Iran is actually popping off. Late Saturday night attack and counter-attack.

Every piece is falling into place at the same time — the astro, the technicals, the geopolitics. This isn't a coincidence.
Alts are getting absolutely destroyed. This isn't random volatility.

DYOR. Not financial advice.

Early replies (first 3)

61923231
>>61923226
Bring me 1500 eth or stfu already pls! Thank you for your attention to this matter!

61923232
>>61923226
Nice Schizo rant

61923238
>>61923231
>>61923232
You can pump this in a matter of hours. Tonight will be a day to remember. Everything has brought us to today. I just want to help all those perma bulls out there and their longs. The ones that listen to shitty youtubers and crypto influencers like Raol Paul, the granny from Ark Investors, etc.

I like /biz/ and just wanna help.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61923274
>>61923238
We will see i approtiate your opinion but i dont believe in it.

61923329
Okay bobo

Just shorted 100x on chinkbase

61923339
>>61923329
I'm not a bear. I hold and stack 2 crypto assets. I'm shorting the rest. I'm just telling you because even if /biz/ has become a very slow board, I had a lot of fun with all of you in the past.

61923345
>>61923274
>approtiate

I also don’t believe your opinion, Rakesh

61923357
>>61923226
Thanks brother, but we know
This will be the bottom of the cycle, it began in early 2025
Next blood moon will be seen in 2028, every bull cycle came after a 12 to 18 months long blood moon period

61923389
>>61923345
Its european hours amerimutt.

61924238
>>61923226
Well who could have thought

61924257
>>61923226
>Mercury retrograde
That's some dumb woman shit right there

item.title: STOP THE COUNT — 9 replies — 36.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
STOP THE COUNT

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-03-02 15:02 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61924150
what the hell is going on. Why is silver crashing and btc pumping. Have they reached an agreement or something

61924158
>>61924135
>>61924150
We're not even up on the 24h. relax

61924218
>>61924150
Jewish tricks, as usual. Global event happens that historically would ve predicting the rise of something -- the opposite happens so the kikes win instead. In a market free of jewish manipulation, there would be more normalcy.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61924225
>>61924218
>If I'm right then I'm a genius
>If I'm wrong then it's da joos manipoolating
what a fucking sad pathetic loser

61924228
Bobo, are you aware of the phrase, "priced in"?

61924251
>>61924228
IT WAS PRICED IN?

61924253
>>61924225
got triggered, shlomo?

61924254
>>61924225
Rat faced kike spotted.

61924262
>>61924150
BTC is oversold and Silver is overbought
all of the narratives are retarded and not necessary, TAchads win again

item.title: Was telling some mechanic wfh engineer how he has no life because he has a job. — 38 replies — 36.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Was telling some mechanic wfh engineer how he has no life because he has a job.

Open thread • Replies: 38 • Updated: 2026-03-02 14:07 UTC

OP

Was telling some mechanic wfh engineer how he has no life because he has a job. He replies with
>if I had no life, I would kms
I go
>you spend most of your time at work. 40 hours a week and 5 out of 7 days. Work IS your life.
He goes
>no, I sleep 8 hours, work 7.5 hours and chill 8 hours.

Are normies this retarded?

Early replies (first 3)

61918491
he's out there living life right now on a Saturday night while you're here posting

61918517
>>61918491
I don’t need to do anything on any specific day like a working class person.

61918538
By default, because he doesn't post on this site, that makes him more free and an overall better person than you.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61918637
>>61918478
You sound like a pathetic retarded faggot trying to justify his meaningless life.

61918676
>>61918607
No it isn’t. Prices drop but people lose their jobs.

61918684
Why are you here if you are wealthy?

61918702
>>61918684
Epstein posted here bro

61918710
>>61918605
Average home price in my city is 900k.
And isn’t the median household income 60k?

61918874
>>61918605
>>61918605
They wouldn't give me a loan because I don't make enough money, so I just bought my $525,000 house outright with my savings. Fuck those bank cocksuckers. Now I just have to pay property taxes.

61920119
>>61918676
If you haven't saved up since 2008 waiting for the REAL housing crash, you are simply NOT going to make it.

as said, skill issue.

61920132
Your ancestors worked twelve hour days, six days a week doing subsistence labor for potatoes, eating meat only during major holidays but you think working eight hours a day in an air-conditioned office and purchasing an international vacation with your labor hours is some kind of slavery because you watched Fight Club. A lot of you are on the border of delusion with the nonsense you spout. You have no knowledge of the past, zero conceptualization of the future. But here you are, making half-assed posts on a horticulture enthusiast image forum.

61920148
>>61920132
Youre right the ancestors were kind of dumb

61920162
>>61920132
No they fucking didn’t.
Have you ever grown a potato in your life? You work hard a few days to get it all in the ground then you simply wait and chill until harvest. Fucking noble retard. Can’t even till.

61920163
>>61920119
wait wait wait, are you saying you gonna spend 18 years of saving up the liquidity from waging and risk taking to dump it onto a depreciating asset that has a naturally declining demand AND is going to get nuked because it has been used as a same asset re-leveraged ponzi collateral for 60 years?
AHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA

61920166
>>61920119
>he "saves" up before making a purchase
ishiggidiggi

61920175
>>61920162
its really about time to cull the pseudo aristocracy of ponzi players of polity, bureaucracy, banker communists, subsidized "privates" and 50+ — they all deserve to die unnatural deaths

61920178
>>61920162
You’re legitimately dumb if you think our ancestors just sat around doing nothing. They worked their dicks off for shelter and food, with not much to spare.

61920183
>>61920178
>its history
>its culture
>do as I say
>please dont kill me
too late. You gonna die

61920187
>>61920178
Yeah, I'm with this guy. Subsistence farming fucking sucked, hence why thurdies would rather toil away in a mine inhaling sulfur fumes and dunking their nuts in mercury, rather than work on a field as a farmer

61920201
>>61920187
Its not that bad it just pays pretty bad. I think.

61920206
>>61920183
No idea what you’re talking about. You’re delusional if you think labor conditions and incentives for work haven’t exponentially gotten better over the past century.
>>61920187
People act like farming is some dope shit. Actually no, it sucks balls which is why we get immigrants to do it.

61920210
>>61920201
If you’re a laborer, yeah. If you’re a farmer with several hundred acres, you make an okay living. It’s a weird sector because the government can’t let you go out of business, so you’ll see white trash in a brand new truck they bought with farm bill money.

61920218
>>61920210
Many farmers went out of business recently lol

61920226
>>61920119
You are retarded.

61920228
>>61918478
lmao, I barely do any work and bought a second house on a lake last year, how poor are you all that you can't even afford one house?

61920234
>>61920218
This usually happens when the third or fourth generation realizes it’s a terrible job. Nobody is taking over for a relative, it just sucks. So they’ll sell the land for several million to some real estate developer probably.

61920258
>>61920163
>>61920166
>>61920226
real estate kikes are scared shitless

61920261
>>61920206
>back in my days
Gramps, your life is over. Your perception of reality is as relevant as a wet fart from last week. Honest suggestion, instead of trying to shill your ideals, kill yourself

61920279
>>61920258
they certainly are. The only reason the akiya market hasnt yet corrected to 1920 levels is because the greatest fools: funds, banks, asset management companies and other ponzi players have acquired the boomer stock that was thrown on the market over the last 4 years with the sole purpose to not see the collateral value of their re-leveraged ponzi schemes melt away and leave them as their creditors bankrupt, holding worthless concrete wood boomer boxes

61920336
>>61920132
expect they were drunk the whole time or on drugs.
and those Drugs and booze used to be cheap!
now you need to be a highly functionally addict with a full time job to afford the habits

61923763
>>61920132
the former is generative and natural surrounded by family. the latter is deracinated ZOG shit surrounded by freaks on ssris and birth control
also fully 1/3 the year was holidays when you look at tudor period.

61923793
>>61920132
>Your ancestors worked twelve hour days, six days a week doing subsistence labor for potatoes, eating meat only during major holidays
my ancestors caved in the skulls of the largest animals on earth and ate nothing but their flesh for their entire lives with nothing but pointy sticks and some clever strategy
when they weren't creating tools and buildings to live in, they were relaxing after engorging themselves on these animals, resting and celebrating before the next glorious hunt
your "history" you reference is the short time between 13k years ago and current, the agricultural revoltuin, AKA when slavery allowed for the domestication and slaveries of massive human cattle farms. You glorify this because you have slaves blood, slave mentality, and a slave's soul.
I bet you even have undying fervour at the prospect of eating plantslop, grains and leaves like the good little retarded goy you are.

61923885
>>61920132
/thread/

item.title: Dominos are falling — 31 replies — 27.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Dominos are falling

Open thread • Replies: 31 • Updated: 2026-03-02 14:01 UTC

OP

Iran is blowing up oil refineries in the UAE as we speak.

Early replies (first 3)

61923034
Oil price go up: I stack.
Oil price go down: I stack.
AMA.

61923035
Two words

61923036
>>61923033
>IQ 276
Wow, I have to follow his trades, NOWW!!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61923040
Another oil nothing burger

61923047
>>61923033
This person does not know what rate hikes are lmao. The FED does not hike rates due to inflation from commodity supply issues. Rate hikes are used to cool an overheated economy, in this case the economy is already slowed plenty and hiking rates is the exact opposite of what's in the playbook right now.

61923050
>>61923047
FED doesn't cut into an oil shock either

61923058
>>61923047
it's literally not a real person, it's an AI bot account that is using an AI likeness of Younghoon Kim, the world record IQ holder, to shill XRP and other bullshit

61923070
Sum Dum Fook has spoken

61923076
Biggest oil refinery in the world hit in the UAE(Aramco). Flames go up, price go up.

61923081
>>61923076

61923083
>>61923070
I wonder if he's related to Sum Ting Wong?

61923090
>>61923033
Nothing ever happens

61923101
>>61923033
>step 10
please god i have 40k usdc on hyperliquid ready to buy, that would be 2btc

61923110
>>61923076
>llOW DOBN

61923124
>>61923034
Stack what?

61923127
>>61923033
A flash crash just flew over my house!

61923129
>>61923076
>>61923081

61923181
>>61923033
I'm not investing in oil, too many other countries which can scale up production to compensate for these losses.

61923256
>>61923124
that's a codeword for he lets black men lay ontop of his wife

61923261
>>61923033
Easiest scam ever to pull off on the internet is put "IQ: 375" and theres a subsection of ultra retards who will become cult followers

61923304
>>61923033
why would the FED do rate hikes this is stupid

61923316
>>61923304
To make the situation worse obviously

61923344
More like 27.6

61923395
>>61923033
xrp to 20$
fucking china

61923417
>>61923256

61923431
>>61923033
Kek I bet big on emergency rate hike on kalshi

61923541
>>61923033
By end of next week? Lets me calculate are these two weeks?

61923792
>>61923033
>the guy who bought the top of xrp from literal uber drivers has a financial outlook
lmao

61923812
>>61923033
>Step 6: Emergency rate hikes

61923831
>>61923058
>it's an AI bot account that is using an AI likeness of Younghoon Kim, the world record IQ holder, to shill XRP and other bullshit
That's fucking hilarious

61923868
>>61923033
>IQ276
That's better than Isaac Newton. i gotta follow him, you just know his plays are gonna make bank

61902172
I bought this shit at $52 like an idiot. I don't want a merger or a buy out. I want them to get their shit together and expand. They own venmo, the need to capitalize on that and take over the little fish with buyer protection.

61902704
>>61891943
What I am going to own Game Stop stock?!

61903001
VOLUME RECORD

61903514
>>61897932
Stop giving jews money

61904108

61904711

OOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO

61904727

we are fucked

61909824

Is this still going to 60$? I went all in at 46 because of this thread.

61919240
>>61918275
I Hope return at price of institutional have buy

61919338
>>61892826
>$300
impressive

>>61918275

the CEO will get his big cut only at $83 dollar share price MINIMUM.
look at warner bros that shit went from below $10 to now beeing baught at $30
If Paypal gets aquired it will be atleast $100

item.title: >bitcoin is a PSYOP to siphon your wealth curious how govs destroyed every prior crypto attempt and the second someone m… — 12 replies — 20.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
>bitcoin is a PSYOP to siphon your wealth curious how govs destroyed every prior crypto attempt and the second someone m…

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-03-02 14:33 UTC

OP

>bitcoin is a PSYOP to siphon your wealth
curious how govs destroyed every prior crypto attempt and the second someone made an immortal decentralized one people desperately tried everything to disperage it. media has been writing about its "death" for its whole existence. bitcoin was and will always be an inconvenient curveball in the monetary system

Early replies (first 3)

61923348
>>61923277
>PSYOP
This thread of many.

61923351
>>61923277
as compelling as your grift is, I'm still not buying your vaporware.

61923546
Its the exact opposite. Buttcorns got "attacked" to fake it as a bottom up currency reform to ensure continuation of power of the existing power structure with a panoptic twist the moment the fiat ponzi goes belly up. It failed. Buttcorns never were accepted outside a small minority of nigger faggots

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61923566
>>61923277

dummy.

61923639
>>61923277
immortal? all they had to do was hire some "devs" and used social consensus attacks (super effective against asocial nerds) and basically bought the network. Small blocks totally neuter the project.

Then they hired an compulsive-liar, alcoholic actor to bismirch the real version of bitcoin that is actually a threat. That way if anyone with sense tries to figure out where we went wrong the glowies will just say "see it was tried but it didn't work oh well dead end we better not try BSV (bitcoin original) again!"

61923652
>>61923639
>muh blocks
bigger blocks never solved anything and made BTC more vulnerable to orphans, centralization, slower block propagation.
Just give it up, your entire gay retarded fork was a grift from a sociopath. The nodes chose accordingly. Cope and seethe.

61923718
>>61923277
crypto removes the banking cartel middle man so its better than fiat
centralized exchanges are a problem though

61923786
>>61923652
>bigger blocks never solved anything
retard detected

61923814
>>61923786
and yet here we are, transaction times and prices at some of the lowest they've ever been, no block size increase needed
almost like we had a better solution or something
cashies lost, kys faggot

61923992
>>61923639
you lost, move on retard

61924051
>>61923718
Extremely simple solution

item.title: Anyone else getting the itch? — 72 replies — 16.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Anyone else getting the itch?

Open thread • Replies: 72 • Updated: 2026-03-02 10:40 UTC

OP

The big boys'll go back up, that's guaranteed money. But some others will 10x, 100x, 1000x. I'm feelin' like it's SHIB's turn.

Early replies (first 3)

61900851
>>61899833
Checked

61900872
>>61899833
I'll just keep buying small amounts of it for the rest of my life, and see what happens.

61900948
>>61899833
i believe in shib

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61912724
>>61912644
Checked and
>You just know
Shibs on sale again!

61912911
this thread smells like india
>YES SAAAR BUY TOAD SAAR IT IS NEW DOGE SAAR

61912963
>>61912911
It’s the next shib not doge, retard

61912969
I boughted more Shib today. It ain't easy being a good boy in these doggy-dog times.

61913401
>>61912969
I never thought it would be this low again. I shlopped another 50m today too.

61913435
>>61913401
Could’ve got close to 1T toad for that price

61915673
>>61912963
Man... can you imagine the seethe on this board if this turns out to be true.

61917994
>>61913435
I made that pic kek

61917997
I had to sell all my toad though

61918166
>>61917997
What if it does what it’s intended to do and you sold? I’m not sure I could live with myself. I’d definitely rather lose the money than live with that type of fuckup for the rest of my life

61918170
Don't make last cycles mistake anon
Stay away from memecoins and bitcoin, 100% in ETH or XMR

61919529
Shib is fucking dead

61919535
>>61919529
yeah, kinda is
Thankfully i still got in early enough that there was never any chance of not making a profit despite missing out on the big gains through greed but there's nothing but a slow bleed right now and i've seen nothing that means it might pump again

61921116
Bro imagine buying that

61921137
Not today

61921143
No such thing as a free lunch

61921144
>>61899833
none of these shitcoins are gonna do big movements again retard

61921169
>>61921144
No such thing as a free lunch

61921558
Just bought some more boys, let's go

61921644
>>61901257
This already rugged.

61921961
>>61921558
Ummm based?

61921988
>>61921644
Checked and true

61922004
kek turd killer still being shilled here in 2026
lmfao nice AI pics btw

61922014
>>61922004

61922070
>>61922004
You have 2 more weeks wagie

61922078
I hope you don’t buy toad

61922734
No one is buying toad in a shib thread! Shib is going to 14x to ath and toad will go to zero. Shib already has an etf coming and toad has desperate curry flavored shills. LMAO!

61923250
>>61922734
When toad moons YOU'RE going to seethe, when toad moons YOU'RE going to rope!

61923260
>>61899833
I am in anon, people are too stupid to skip this one.
And some Doge in case the elom makes a comeback.

item.title: ""THE FUTURE OF FINANCE"" — 17 replies — 12.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
""THE FUTURE OF FINANCE""

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-03-02 13:48 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61921606
>>61921599
>stablecoins
>exchanges
Deserved.

61921612
>>61921599
What is slippage and who would set it to 99%.... Probably above 100 iq bigbrain bros fr fr no cap!

61921797
>>61921599
why did you repost this shit from the last decade?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61922103
That’s why I use Rubic unironically. It’s the only swapping service that has decent privacy features.

61922206
>>61921599
Proof of stake was a retarded concept in hindsight

61922296
>>61921599
should have used cow swap or curve or whatever
>>61922103
rubic's website, like chainlink, stopped working with brave browser integration.
rubic is a scam anyway

61922350
https://www.lightspark.com/glossary/stablecoin-sandwich
thanks for this op, one less way i can get rekt from now on

61922425
>>61921599
once you add all the losses from smart contract exploits and MEV bot shenanigans it becomes quickly apparent that only a fucking moron would expect institutions to adopt eth as a transaction layer.

61923392
>>61922425
What is slippage?

61923405
>>61921599
Guess he should have set a higher gas fee lmao

61923519
>>61922206
>PoS
it's in the name

61923521
>>61921797
it’s last week you retard

61923564
>>61922425
yep, obviously not when they can’t control it.

61923565
Meanwhile.......

61923572
>>61922425
link solves this unironically

61923784
>>61921599

61923804
>>61921599

There’s your problem.

item.title: HOLY SHIT /biz/ GET IN HERE — 18 replies — 10.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
HOLY SHIT /biz/ GET IN HERE

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-03-02 13:28 UTC

OP

TOWELHEADS WENT MAD
Some drones/missiles are now striking Saudi Aramcos Ras Tanura facility.

Ras Tanura is the single largest oil export terminal on the planet. It handles roughly 6.5 million barrels per day, nearly 7% of global oil supply flows through this one facility.

>>/pol/529614777

Early replies (first 3)

61923098
>>61923084
How does this affect the price of eth exactly?

61923108
>>61923098
It's only a matter of time until Trump forces rate cuts and money printing to get us through all the chaos that he's started. Some of that sweet liquidity will filter into ETH to shoot it past $10k. Just wait.

61923119
>>61923108
Kek

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61923121
AI

61923176
>>61923121
check Reuters or CNN or whatever reliable news you filthy coping kike

61923191
>>61923084
Maybe the world needs a break from oil for a few months.

61923192
>>61923121
lol

61923194
>>61923084
Why is oil not going up wtf?

61923210
>>61923194
why should it? no one needs oil because people are driving EVs now

61923222
markets didn't open yet, wait till burgers wake up

61923263
>>61923194
It will, markets need time to assess the impact on supply

61923353
>>61923194
Token not needed + infinite supply

61923393
>>61923098
fpbp

61923446
I boughted WTI at 72.78
will I get fucked?

61923547
>>61923194
we are gap filling. wait for market open. (I just don't know whether to go by chicago or ny open)

61923654
>>61923084
How do I profit from this?
Buy low, never sell I think
And Europe's getting fucked by oil prices
No surprise here

61923721
>>61923098
kek fpbp
cryptoboard
let the goyim deal with the real world

61923727
>>61923446
You should be buying brent - it's from the gulf.
WTI is american slop.
